_about: Reference metrics the regression gate checks against. Update deliberately after a verified improvement, never to mask a regression.
_source_dataset: data/eval/eval_rows.jsonl (84 rows: 34 direct / 18 adversarial / 17 multi_hop / 15 out_of_domain)
_mode: rewrite=off, rerank=on, multi_query=off. Gate disables LLM rewrite to stay deterministic; run_eval.py uses defaults (rewrite=on).
_notes: Hit@1 expected to be lower than the 54-row baseline because multi_hop/adversarial rows are harder to rank first; Hit@5 actually improved (0.909 -> 0.942) because top-5 is forgiving.

2026-04-24 Step E: rebuilt 3 KBs (jd_demo / taobao_demo / cs4303) with Contextual Retrieval prefixes. Rewrite=off (gate) barely moved -- MRR@10 nudged 0.841 -> 0.843. Rewrite=on user-facing path moved more: Hit@1 0.773 -> 0.797, MRR@10 0.859 -> 0.878, multi_hop bucket MRR 0.941 -> 0.971. airbyte_demo skipped (connector-sourced, no local raw).

answer._subset: first 20 rows after out_of_domain is filtered out (direct + adversarial + multi_hop)
